_rationale: Because grey literature lacks the peer-review filter of academic venues, an additional qualitative appraisal is applied to grey sources (following Garousi et al.). These are NOT separate inclusion criteria: IC1-IC6 remain the unified inclusion protocol for all sources. This appraisal operates jointly with IC3, IC4, and IC5, and traces back to reviewer comments A1/A12.

application.how: Injected as guidance into the grey-screening prompt (not the academic one). The screening agent weighs these dimensions qualitatively when deciding whether a grey source passes IC3/IC4 within the IC5 time window. Definitions are explicit and versioned; only the application is subjective.

appraisal_dimensions.name: Authority and credibility of the producer
appraisal_dimensions.text: Prioritise official vendor pages, recognised platforms, and actively maintained repositories over informal or anonymous commentary.

appraisal_dimensions.name: Outlet type
appraisal_dimensions.text: Favour primary artifacts (the tool itself, its documentation, or its source repository) over secondary opinion pieces. Later confirmed by classifying each grey source by artifact type (paper Section 4).

appraisal_dimensions.name: Objectivity and verifiability
appraisal_dimensions.text: Each entry must expose a concrete, inspectable, and currently accessible solution.
